# arubasdwan_app_search (Data Source)

Performs a server-side wildcard search across all application definitions on the Orchestrator (built-in + user-defined) via POST /gms/rest/applicationDefinition/applications/wildcard. Returns the list of matching application names, which can be referenced in security policies.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "arubasdwan_app_search" "example" {
  pattern = "skype"
  limit   = 0
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `pattern` (String) Substring pattern to search for (case-insensitive on the Orchestrator side).

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of results to return. 0 means no limit. Defaults to 0.

### Read-Only

- `applications` (List of String) List of matching application names.
